items.headline: RBI maintains repo rate at 5.25%, lowers GDP forecast due to inflation concerns.
items.summary: The RBI's Monetary Policy Committee (MPC) maintained the repo rate at 5.25% due to rising inflation projections and global uncertainties. India's real GDP growth forecast was revised downwards to 6.6% from 6.9% for the current fiscal year, and CPI inflation projection for FY27 was raised to 5.1% from 4.6%.

items.headline: Indian markets open cautiously amid weak global cues and US tech sell-off.
items.summary: Indian markets opened cautiously, influenced by a significant sell-off in US technology stocks (Nasdaq Composite down 1.32%) and lower Asian markets. However, easing crude oil prices and US-Iran negotiation progress offered some positive sentiment.

items.headline: Vikas Lifecare to announce audited results today; Infosys results slated for July 23.
items.summary: Vikas Lifecare Ltd. has its audited results scheduled for June 23, 2026. Infosys is slated to announce its audited results on July 23, 2026.

items.headline: Oil & Gas, Power, IT, Pharma, Media sectors rally; FMCG, Consumer Durables see profit-taking.
items.summary: On Monday, oil & gas, power, IT, and pharma sectors demonstrated strong buying interest. The Nifty Pharma index surged by 1.24% and Nifty Media by 1.42%. Conversely, FMCG (-0.41%) and Consumer Durables (-0.55%) indices experienced mild profit-taking. Tech and metals sectors are reportedly dragging the Nifty today.
